message:
style: rustfmt and unwrap safety across cli, sdk, session_store, compaction

Formatting and minor safety improvements:

- cli.rs: Reformat assert_eq with long vec literal onto multiple lines
- sdk.rs: Reformat BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES array to one item per line
- session_store_v2.rs: Break long method chains across lines for
  into_inner().map_err() and open() calls
- compaction_worker.rs: Replace .unwrap() on Instant::checked_sub()
  with .unwrap_or_else(Instant::now) — prevents panic if system clock
  goes backwards during tests on loaded machines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
